title: Project Gigabit network build contract – Cheshire
body: "BDUK and Freedom Fibre have mutually agreed to terminate the Project Gigabit contract for Cheshire. BDUK is now moving swiftly to put in place alternative plans with other suppliers to connect premises that were due to be connected.  Freedom Fibre has not received any public funding for this contract.  Further information about Project Gigabit can be found on the BDUK website and under Project Gigabit: UK Subsidy advice.  "
